name: Time Running Out - Animated Clocks
description: Two animated clocks on both sides showing time running fast with centered warning text

FastClock.code: function FastClock(props) { const speedMultiplier = props.speed || 10; const timeInSeconds = (props.frame / props.fps) * speedMultiplier; const hours = Math.floor(timeInSeconds / 3600) % 12 || 12; const minutes = Math.floor((timeInSeconds % 3600) / 60); const seconds = Math.floor(timeInSeconds % 60); const secondAngle = (seconds * 6) + ((props.frame % props.fps) / props.fps) * 6; const minuteAngle = (minutes * 6) + (seconds / 60) * 6; const hourAngle = (hours * 30) + (minutes / 60) * 30; const size = props.layerSize.width; const center = size / 2; const clockRadius = size * 0.4; const createHand = (angle, length, width, color) => { const rad = (angle - 90) * Math.PI / 180; const x2 = center + Math.cos(rad) * length; const y2 = center + Math.sin(rad) * length; return React.createElement('line', { x1: center, y1: center, x2: x2, y2: y2, stroke: color, strokeWidth: width, strokeLinecap: 'round' }); }; const hourMarkers = []; for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) { const angle = i * 30; const rad = (angle - 90) * Math.PI / 180; const outerRadius = clockRadius; const innerRadius = clockRadius * 0.85; const x1 = center + Math.cos(rad) * innerRadius; const y1 = center + Math.sin(rad) * innerRadius; const x2 = center + Math.cos(rad) * outerRadius; const y2 = center + Math.sin(rad) * outerRadius; hourMarkers.push(React.createElement('line', { key: 'hour-' + i, x1: x1, y1: y1, x2: x2, y2: y2, stroke: props.color || '#ffffff', strokeWidth: size * 0.015, strokeLinecap: 'round' })); } const minuteMarkers = []; for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { if (i % 5 === 0) continue; const angle = i * 6; const rad = (angle - 90) * Math.PI / 180; const outerRadius = clockRadius; const innerRadius = clockRadius * 0.92; const x1 = center + Math.cos(rad) * innerRadius; const y1 = center + Math.sin(rad) * innerRadius; const x2 = center + Math.cos(rad) * outerRadius; const y2 = center + Math.sin(rad) * outerRadius; minuteMarkers.push(React.createElement('line', { key: 'min-' + i, x1: x1, y1: y1, x2: x2, y2: y2, stroke: props.color || '#ffffff', strokeWidth: size * 0.005, strokeLinecap: 'round', opacity: 0.5 })); } const glowIntensity = Math.sin(props.frame * 0.1) * 0.3 + 0.7; return React.createElement('svg', { width: size, height: size, style: { filter: 'drop-shadow(0 0 ' + (size * 0.05) + 'px rgba(255, 68, 68, ' + glowIntensity + '))' } }, React.createElement('circle', { cx: center, cy: center, r: clockRadius, fill: 'transparent', stroke: props.color || '#ffffff', strokeWidth: size * 0.02 }), React.createElement('circle', { cx: center, cy: center, r: clockRadius * 0.05, fill: props.color || '#ffffff' }), ...hourMarkers, ...minuteMarkers, createHand(hourAngle, clockRadius * 0.5, size * 0.02, props.color || '#ffffff'), createHand(minuteAngle, clockRadius * 0.7, size * 0.015, props.color || '#ffffff'), createHand(secondAngle, clockRadius * 0.85, size * 0.008, '#ff4444')); }
FastClock.description: Animated analog clock with customizable speed multiplier
